title: hieracium bifidum var. ocenicum
intro: Hieracium bifidum var. ocenicum, also known as a variety of Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum var. ocenicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, where it can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
